aiInsight: Today presents no true banker; even Liverpool, consistently hitting 7.5 SOT on average, faces a disciplined counter-attacking side known for limiting chances, nullifying their usual SOT advantage. Avoid the Spurs vs. Villa clash; both teams show volatile SOT outputs (Spurs 4.2-8.1, Villa 3.9-7.5), creating a wide SOT range that defies confident prediction. Confidence in today's SOT card is critically low; this slate demands extreme caution and minimal investment.
